sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a standard operational procedure that is expected and has negligible impact on financial performance.

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program signals management confidence and provides direct support to the stock price.

sentiment.reasoning: A 25% margin improvement indicates significant operational efficiency gains that directly boost profitability.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
